issues.title: Enemy dealt 33 dmg (87% of 38 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 9 (seq 233), the enemy dealt 33 damage which is 87% of the player's 38 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 22 dmg (100% of 22 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 10 (seq 237), the enemy dealt 22 damage which is 100% of the player's 22 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: 5 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-2): HP stayed above 90
issues.description: 5 consecutive encounters where player ended with HP > 90 (90% of 100). Encounters: F1E0:98HP, F1E1:100HP, F1E2:91HP, F2E0:94HP, F2E1:100HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or reduce healing on early floors.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 by knowledge_golem (boss)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against knowledge_golem (boss). Accuracy was 63% over 10 turns. They dealt 64 damage and took 176 damage. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing boss HP/damage on floor 3, or providing a healing opportunity before bosses.

issues.title: Player defeated despite 73% accuracy — knowledge mastery didn't save them
issues.description: Player was defeated with 73% overall accuracy (119/163 correct), well above 60%. Dying despite knowing the material feels unfair and undermines the core loop.
reproductionSteps: Review enemy damage scaling vs. healing/shield availability
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce enemy damage or increase healing for players above 60% accuracy (canary system integration).

issues.title: F2E2 (stone_sentinel) took 18 turns vs prev floor avg 2.7
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 against stone_sentinel (mini_boss) took 18 turns. Previous floor averaged 2.7 turns. This is a 6.8x spike, exceeding the 2x threshold.
issues.suggestedFix: Review stone_sentinel HP/defense scaling relative to floor 1 enemies.

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 5 in floor 3 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 3, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 (>70) to 5 (<20). Going from >70% to <20% in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap per-encounter damage or add emergency healing triggers.
